title: Belgrade
subtitle: Belgrade · Beograd · 5 routes
meta: Serbia - fortress, rivers, Zemun, and modernism
practicalNote: City buses, trams, trolleybuses, and BG Train have been free since 2025. Keep dinars for small purchases and markets; in Belgrade you will see both Cyrillic and Latin scripts.

identity.hook: Fortress above Roman Singidunum - 1st c. CE
